title: A Very Frank Christmas
description: Bringing the christmas spirit to minecraft with a bunch of building blocks
body:
![A Very Frank Christmas Banner in front of a christmas scene](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qnj8tt6h/images/0f0e01525686a07ba32570e5282fdd1d784cfbf4.png)

## 📖 About
The main goal of the modpack is to offer players **christmas themed and additional blocks to help build and decorate your dream festive home** alongside other quality of life mods and cute texture packs. You can even have **snowball fights with your friends** or **gift them presents** wrapped up under their tree!

_Originally made for a private friend group but enough effort was put into making it that it was worth making it public <3_

![A gingerbread christmas dinner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qnj8tt6h/images/09c14c2e68923de5da8ac13057f56aa72321d4ae.png)
## Shader recomendations (see gallery for screenshots with each one)
- Only use if you have a medium to high end pc: BSL and Photon
- Recomended for mid range pcs: Free vibrant
- Recomended for low end pcs: Mellow
- Complimentary comes with 2 presets(**in shaderpack options you can find an import settings button next to reset, use that to import the preset from the file**) custom high which is recommended for mid to high end pcs and default low (literaly the very low option provided by complimentary but the way settings are saved is weird so i just made it a separate file so people can use it without deleting the high end one)



## ✍️ Credits
